summary: Completed comprehensive testing of GradNext consulting interview preparation website. Backend APIs (26 tests) all pass. Frontend pages load correctly with proper navigation. Found pricing data inconsistency between frontend mock data and backend API.

minor.issue: Returns 503 when Razorpay keys not configured (expected behavior)

integration_issues.issue: Frontend mock data has different pricing than backend API - Mid Mile shows ₹31,999 on frontend but API returns ₹29,999. Cohort plans also differ: Frontend shows Premium ₹12,999/Elite ₹19,999 but API returns ₹34,999/₹49,999

action_items: Sync frontend mock data pricing with backend API pricing for coaching plans (Mid Mile: ₹29,999 not ₹31,999)
Sync frontend mock data pricing with backend API pricing for cohort plans (Premium: ₹34,999, Elite: ₹49,999)
Configure Razorpay API keys in backend/.env for payment functionality
critical_code_review_comments: Pricing data is hardcoded in frontend/src/data/mock.js instead of fetching from /api/payments/plans endpoint - consider fetching dynamically
Frontend subscription page (VideoCourse.jsx) has correct pricing but coaching/cohort pages use mock data with different values

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all pages load, navigation works, minor pricing inconsistency)

test_credentials: N/A - public pages tested without authentication
seed_data_creation: Backend seeded with 5 mentors, 10 videos, 4 workshops, 10 drills, 10 materials, cohort sessions
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend APIs fully tested and working. Frontend public pages tested. Dashboard requires Emergent Auth login. Payment functionality requires Razorpay keys configuration. Main issue is pricing data inconsistency between mock.js and backend API.
